name: echo
description: Legacy Function node — n8n returns the same items array because the snippet is `return items;`. SabFlow does NOT ship a JS runtime (deliberate: every code path must go through the expression-engine sandbox at rust/crates/sabflow-executor/expression/, which is still a scaffold). Until the sandbox lands, SabFlow returns a typed error with the stable code `function.js_not_yet_supported`. This fixture pins that divergence so flipping it back to parity later is a one-line fixture edit, not a runner change.

expectedDivergence.reason: SabFlow ships the Function node as a typed-error stub until the expression-engine JS sandbox lands. See nodes/function.rs TODO and PLAN-sabflow-coverage.md Phase C.3.2.
